summary: Completed comprehensive testing of NASSAQ Platform Admin Dashboard (لوحة تحكم مدير المنصة) with Global Filters and Enhanced Analytics Cards - Iteration 16. All 8 requested features tested and PASSED. Backend API filters working correctly, Frontend UI fully functional.

minor.issue: Was returning 500 error due to SchoolStatus enum missing 'setup' value
minor.status: FIXED - Added SETUP = 'setup' to SchoolStatus enum

issues: Console warning: 'The width(-1) and height(-1) of chart should be greater than 0' - Recharts library warning, does not affect functionality

passed_tests: 1. تسجيل الدخول كمدير منصة (Platform Admin Login) - ✓ PASS - Email: info@nassaqapp.com works correctly
2. عرض اسم المستخدم بجانب التاريخ - ✓ PASS - Shows 'مرحباً مدير المنصة' with user icon
3. عرض التاريخ الهجري والميلادي - ✓ PASS - Shows '1447/03/09 هـ (03/09/2026)'
4. فلتر النطاق (Scope Filter) - ✓ PASS - 3 options: كل المنصة / مدرسة محددة / مجموعة مدارس
5. فلتر المدينة (City Filter) - ✓ PASS - Selecting الرياض changes schools from 210 to 23
6. فلتر الحالة (Status Filter) - ✓ PASS - Selecting نشطة changes schools from 210 to 141
7. فلتر الفترة الزمنية (Time Filter) - ✓ PASS - Options: الآن/اليوم/الأسبوع/الشهر/مخصص
8. تغيير البيانات بدون إعادة تحميل - ✓ PASS - Data updates dynamically when filters change
9. Smart Delta Indicator - ✓ PASS - Shows +12%, +2.4%, +2.8% with correct colors (green for up, red for down)
10. Health Status Tag - ✓ PASS - Shows 'طبيعي' (Normal) or 'يحتاج متابعة' (Needs Attention)
11. Sparkline Charts - ✓ PASS - Mini line charts visible in each analytics card
12. Quick Actions - ✓ PASS - Settings icon shows dropdown with عرض التفاصيل/فتح التقرير/ضبط تنبيه
13. Card Click Navigation - ✓ PASS - Clicking schools card navigates to /admin/schools
14. زر التحديث الآن (Refresh) - ✓ PASS - Shows success toast 'تم تحديث البيانات بنجاح'
15. زر التصدير (Export) - ✓ PASS - Dropdown shows تنزيل PDF and تنزيل Excel options
16. إعدادات العرض (Display Settings) - ✓ PASS - Dialog with show/hide toggles and reorder buttons
critical_code_review_comments: Recharts console warning about chart dimensions - consider adding minWidth/minHeight to ResponsiveContainer
Export PDF generates HTML file (not actual PDF) - user needs to print as PDF. Consider using jsPDF library for direct PDF generation
updated_files: /app/backend/tests/test_dashboard_filters.py - Created new test file for dashboard filters
context_for_next_testing_agent: Platform Admin Dashboard Global Filters testing completed successfully. All filters work correctly: Scope (all/single/multi), City (الرياض shows 23 schools), Status (active shows 141 schools), Time window. Analytics cards show Delta indicators, Health tags, Sparklines, and Quick Actions. Export and Refresh buttons work. Display Settings dialog allows show/hide and reorder of cards. Card clicks navigate to detail pages.

mocked_apis.note: All data comes from real MongoDB database. Backend API /api/dashboard/stats supports all filter parameters.
